obj_ch5_LW09_slash_Step_0_gml_37_0: \E0* Ready^1, Kris^1? We probably won't be coming back here today.../
obj_ch5_LW09_slash_Step_0_gml_153_0: \EP* Have a wonderful day today^1, you two!/%
obj_ch5_LW09_slash_Step_0_gml_178_0: \E1* Make sure to ride lots of rides^1, have lots of treats.../%
obj_ch5_LW09_slash_Step_0_gml_198_0: \E2* And don't forget to eat your costume!/
obj_ch5_LW10_slash_Step_0_gml_116_0: \EK* My outfit..^1. uhh..^1. only works in the Dark World^1, huh./%
obj_ch5_LW11_slash_Step_0_gml_28_0: \ED* Oh yeah^1, Kris..^1. uhh..^1. I was thinking^1, y'know./
obj_ch5_LW11_slash_Step_0_gml_29_0: \EN* If things go well today^1, we might have another shot at getting.../
obj_ch5_LW11_slash_Step_0_gml_31_0: \EN* And if we do that^1, we can try get the code again./
obj_ch5_LW11_slash_Step_0_gml_32_0: \E2* So don't worry^1. It's all part of the plan^1, y'know?/
obj_ch5_LW11_slash_Step_0_gml_34_0: \EN* Help me make sure everything goes good./%
obj_ch5_LW11A_slash_Step_0_gml_142_0: \EM* H-huh!^1? Th..^1. thanks^1! You..^1. you look nice^1, too...!/%
obj_ch5_LW11A_slash_Step_0_gml_189_0: \ER* You^1, just^1, um^1, have some trash in your hair./
obj_ch5_LW11A_slash_Step_0_gml_191_0: \Eo* Hey^1, just thought I'd dress up a bit for once./%
obj_ch5_LW11A_slash_Step_0_gml_232_0: (Aww, that's just so Susie I can't stand it...!)
obj_ch5_LW11A_slash_Step_0_gml_233_0: (Obviously it wouldn't work in the Light World...)
obj_ch5_LW11A_slash_Step_0_gml_260_0: \E6* ..^1. so..^1. what do you want to do first?/
obj_ch5_LW11A_slash_Step_0_gml_344_0: \E4* Umm^1, yeah^1! Kris^1, be our tour guide!/
obj_ch5_LW11A_slash_Step_0_gml_345_0: \E8* (It IS kinda easier having Kris here after all...)/
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_123_0: \E8* Fahaha^1! When did you say you made up that song?/%
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_165_0: \EJ* O French fry on the floor..^1. it's you that I adore.../
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_166_0: \EF* Greasy and salty and lots lots..^1. more?/%
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_190_0: \E9* Hahahah^1! Dude^1, you could be like^1, a pro music guy!/
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_192_0: \E3* Ha^1, um..^1. it's never really been my talent./
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_194_0: \E6* Really^1? 'Cause even when it's dumb stuff^1, your singing's.../
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_235_0: \Eo* ..^1. probably one of the best days ever./%
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_296_0: \ET* ..^1. kinda sucks it's almost over^1, huh?/
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_300_0: \E3* How long have we been talking?/
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_304_0: \E3* ..^1. gosh^1, should we wake up Kris...?/%
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_339_0: \E8* Well^1, just the two of us is cool sometimes^1, too./
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_387_0: \EA* I know she's gonna ask if I'm with you.../
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_391_0: \E9* But I guess..^1. I can't not answer it.../%
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_416_0: \E2* 'less you lost your phone again^1, right?/%
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_439_0: \E9* Then you'd have to keep hanging out./
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_467_0: \EG* Uh..^1. I didn't hurt your phone though^1, right?/
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_541_0: \Eo* Here^1. The honors of your phone./%
